description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 Porsche Cayenne S Coupe, 2.9L TC V6, AWD, 440bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 289,000 or AED 4,371 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 66,412 KM's - 1 Year Blackline Warranty - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Sports Exhaust - Electric Memory Seats - Bose Surround Sound Speakers - ‘PORSCHE’ Logo LED Door Courtesy Lights - Fixed Panoramic Roof in Glass - Apple Carplay - Sports Steering Wheel - Bluetooth Connectivity - Cruise Control - Satellite Navigation - Lane Change Assist (LCA) - Sport Chrono Package with Analog Clock - 4-Zone Climate Control - 360 Surround View Camera - Voice Control - Window Trim in High Gloss Black - Ambient Lighting - Power Steering Plus
